Workflow.Coding: I am proficient in *Julia (https://julialang.org/)*, which serves as my primary programming language. Moreover, I am specially proficient in the *Quantica.jl (https://pablosanjose.github.io/Quantica.jl/stable/)* package. Regarding other scientific programming languages, I have prior experience with *Python (https://www.python.org/)* and *Mathematica (https://www.wolfram.com/mathematica/)*. Concerning my workflow, I utilize *GitHub (https://github.com/)* as my primary cloud-based code management system, employing GitBranches within *VSCode (https://code.visualstudio.com/)* to facilitate structured collaboration through commits and pull operations.
Workflow.Writing: I am fully proficient in *LaTeX (https://www.latex-project.org/)*, which serves as my primary writing language, both for collaborative work in *Overleaf (https://www.overleaf.com/project)* and for personal notes in *LyX (https://www.lyx.org/Home)*.
Workflow.Presenting: I am proficient in *Inkscape (https://inkscape.org/about/)*, which serves s my primary media editing software, whether for creating slide presentations, posters, or producing figures for publications. I also have an interest in learning *Blender (https://www.blender.org/)* to extend my work into 3D.
